notes: Source of truth for the item editor. Export via item_editor.html → downloads project/data/items.json section. Tile paths are relative to the DCSS tile pack root (dcss/Dungeon Crawl Stone Soup Full/).

dagger.label: Dagger
dagger.flavor: Fast, stabbing. Crit and Agility affixes shine here.

knife.label: Knife
knife.flavor: Improvised edge weapon. Low floor, low ceiling.

quick_blade.label: Quick Blade
quick_blade.flavor: Extreme speed, low raw damage. Future: attack speed scaling.

rapier.label: Rapier
rapier.flavor: Thrusting weapon. High crit multiplier flavor. Future: piercing.

scimitar.label: Scimitar
scimitar.flavor: Wide curved blade. Highest base damage in 1H class.

katana.label: Katana
katana.flavor: Precise Eastern blade. High crit flavor.

demon_blade.label: Demon Blade
demon_blade.flavor: Infernal forge. Future: fire damage on hit.

fire.desc: Future: fire damage on hit. Currently: Strength affix bonus.

ice.desc: Future: chill/slow on hit. Currently: Agility affix bonus.

holy.desc: Future: bonus damage vs undead/demon. Currently: Stamina affix bonus.

dark.desc: Future: defense reduction debuff. Currently: Crit affix bonus.

vampiric.desc: Future: lifesteal per hit. Currently: Regen affix bonus.

poison.desc: Future: damage over time. Currently: no bonus.

swift.desc: Future: attack speed increase. Currently: Agility affix bonus.

precision.desc: Future: higher crit multiplier (2.0x vs 1.5x). Currently: Crit affix bonus.

magic.desc: Future: penetrates magic resistance. Currently: no bonus.

brutal.desc: Future: armor penetration. Currently: Strength affix bonus.

dragon_bane.desc: Future: +50% vs dragon-type enemies. Currently: no bonus.

arcane.desc: Future: double-strike mechanic. Currently: no bonus.

crystal.desc: Future: chance to shatter (AoE hit). Currently: no bonus.

sound.desc: Future: scales with kill count. Currently: no bonus.

death.desc: Future: death mark (target takes +25% damage for 3s). Currently: no bonus.

drop_weight_schema: Array of 5 weights [T1,T2,T3,T4,T5] — relative probability this item appears in the loot pool for each dungeon tier. 0 = never drops there. Higher = more likely relative to other items in that tier's pool.

items.name: Rusty Dagger
items.lore: A battered blade, more rust than iron.

items.name: Bone Knife
items.lore: Fashioned from something that used to be alive.

items.name: Shiv
items.lore: Improvised. Effective. Ugly.

items.name: Chipped Short Sword
items.lore: A serviceable blade, if you ignore the nicks.

items.name: Iron Dagger
items.lore: Standard issue for those who prefer not to be seen.

items.name: Short Falchion
items.lore: A light curved blade. More than it looks.

items.name: Steel Short Sword
items.lore: Properly forged. An honest weapon.

items.name: Elven Dagger
items.lore: Light enough to forget you're carrying it, until you aren't.

items.name: Iron Falchion
items.lore: A broad single-edge blade. Prefers wide swings.

items.name: Orcish Short Sword
items.lore: Hacked from black iron. Bites first, asks nothing.

items.name: Rapier
items.lore: A slender thrusting weapon. Rewards patience.

items.name: Quick Blade
items.lore: The fastest blade in the Dungeon. Blink and it's already over.

items.name: Steel Falchion
items.lore: A proper blade, properly made.

items.name: Mithril Short Sword
items.lore: Light. Strong. Expensive to replace.

items.name: Iron Long Sword
items.lore: A proper weapon for a proper fight.

items.name: Silver Rapier
items.lore: Dipped in holy water before forging. Undead hate it.

items.name: Scimitar
items.lore: A curve that finds every gap in armor.

items.name: Silver Sabre
items.lore: Silver-edged. Blessed. Smells faintly of incense.

items.name: Steel Long Sword
items.lore: Dependable. Exactly as good as it needs to be.

items.name: Elven Short Sword
items.lore: Almost too light to feel. Compensates by being very sharp.

items.name: Runed Falchion
items.lore: Sigils run down the blade, each one a name.

items.name: Mithril Long Sword
items.lore: Light enough to carry all day, heavy enough to end the day.

items.name: Katana
items.lore: Simple. Exact. Deadly.

items.name: Runed Scimitar
items.lore: The runes pulse when it cuts. Nobody knows why.

items.name: Elven Broadsword
items.lore: Longer than it looks. Lighter than possible.

items.name: Crystal Long Sword
items.lore: Carved from a single growth of arcane crystal. Hums when hungry.

items.name: Mithril Katana
items.lore: Forged over seven years. Used for the rest.

items.name: Ancient Sword
items.lore: Nobody remembers who made it. Nobody dares ask.

items.name: Demon Blade
items.lore: Forged in a plane that shouldn't exist. Wants to go back.

items.name: The Singing Sword
items.lore: A blade said to sing in battle. The tune changes with each kill.

items.name: Chilly Death
items.lore: Leaves wounds that refuse to close. Cold as the depths of Glacier.

items.name: Bloodbane
items.lore: Drinks deep from those it cuts. Never seems satisfied.

items.name: The Doom Knight's Blade
items.lore: A weapon that has ended civilizations. It prefers it that way.

items.name: Knife of Accuracy
items.lore: Always finds the right place to be. Unfortunately for whatever it lands in.

items.name: Spriggan's Knife
items.lore: Light as a leaf-stem. Faster than thought.

items.name: Vampire's Tooth
items.lore: It thirsts. Always. The wearer learns to provide.

items.name: Arc Blade
items.lore: Lightning runs the length of the blade. It hisses when wet.

items.name: Eos
items.lore: Forged from a fragment of dawn. It does not dim.

items.name: The Sword of Jihad
items.lore: Each kill draws the bearer further into something they can't quite name.

items.name: Sword of Cerebov
items.lore: Cerebov never let it go. Even in defeat. Even now.

items.name: Sword of Power
items.lore: ATK scales with the bearer's current HP. The healthy hit hardest.

items.name: Sword of Zonguldrok
items.lore: Each kill rises briefly to fight beside the bearer. Briefly.
Forged in dragonfire, the metal still glows when blood spills near it.
items.name: Crimson Runed Falchion

items.lore: Damp green spores drift from every notch — they twitch toward warm flesh.
items.name: Mossy Silver Rapier

items.lore: Damp green spores drift from every notch — they twitch toward warm flesh.
items.name: Mossy Bone Knife

items.lore: Carved from one piece of imperial jade. Fault-lines make patterns.
items.name: Jade-forged Iron Long Sword

items.lore: Forged in dragonfire, the metal still glows when blood spills near it.
items.name: Crimson Steel Falchion

items.lore: It is somehow always slightly cooler than its surroundings.
items.name: Spectral Vampire's Tooth

items.lore: Verdigris-greened copper that crackles when storms approach.
items.name: Coppersworn Katana

items.lore: Volcanic glass, edge-flaked razor-sharp by patient hands.
items.name: Obsidian Vampire's Tooth

items.lore: A rime of ice will not melt, no matter how warm the room.
items.name: Frostbound Elven Dagger

items.lore: Carries its own slow heat. Embers drift from it when struck.
items.name: Embered Steel Falchion

items.lore: Forged in dragonfire, the metal still glows when blood spills near it.
items.name: Crimson Sword of Power

items.lore: Carries its own slow heat. Embers drift from it when struck.
items.name: Embered Demon Blade

items.lore: Damp green spores drift from every notch — they twitch toward warm flesh.
items.name: Mossy Steel Long Sword

items.lore: Forged in dragonfire, the metal still glows when blood spills near it.
items.name: Crimson Ancient Sword

items.lore: A rime of ice will not melt, no matter how warm the room.
items.name: Frostbound Runed Scimitar

items.lore: An alloy out of fashion in this century. The shine is unmistakable.
items.name: Rose-gold Scimitar

items.lore: Old blood, deep in the grain. It never dries.
items.name: Bloodstained Bone Knife

items.lore: A rime of ice will not melt, no matter how warm the room.
items.name: Frostbound Elven Broadsword

items.lore: Shaped from the long bones of something old. It still aches in the cold.
items.name: Bone Sword of Power
Hellsigil Brand
items.lore: Brands the air it cuts. Old promise re-renewed.

items.name: Knife of the Quiet Road
items.lore: Soft on the road. Loud on the kidney.

items.name: Toxic Splintered Tooth
items.lore: Remember to wear gloves.

items.name: Wisp-Lance
items.lore: Light as a thought. Cuts faster than one.

items.name: Eustachio's Dancing Sword
items.lore: The blade leads. Eustachio was, quite literally, just along for the ride.

items.name: Aizul's Snake-Fang Knife
items.lore: Carved from a single tooth. Still drips, faintly, in dry air.

items.name: Frost Dagger
items.lore: The blade fogs the air around it. Easy to lose grip on a cold morning.

items.name: Viper Fang
items.lore: Hollow-ground. The groove holds something that drips slow and green.

items.name: Venomtongue
items.lore: The serrations whisper when drawn. Wipe the blade and the whisper does not stop.
